_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PANEL
name: Romestead
author: pinkyd.fetch623@passinbox.com
description: Romestead is a multiplayer survival and settlement-building game. This egg installs and runs the official Romestead Dedicated Server (Steam App ID 4763510) on Linux using the bundled .NET 8 runtime. The server listens on UDP and is configured via config.json.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Romestead Dedicated Server installation script
#
# Server files: /mnt/server
# Install container: ghcr.io/pelican-eggs/installers:debian

## fall back to anonymous Steam login if no creds were provided
if [[ "${STEAM_USER}" == "" ]] || [[ "${STEAM_PASS}" == "" ]]; then
    echo -e "steam user is not set.\n"
    echo -e "Using anonymous user.\n"
    STEAM_USER=anonymous
    STEAM_PASS=""
    STEAM_AUTH=""
else
    echo -e "user set to ${STEAM_USER}"
fi

## download and install steamcmd
cd /tmp
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
curl -sSL -o steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
tar -xzvf steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamapps
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd

## SteamCMD needs to own /mnt during install; permissions are reset by the panel afterward.
chown -R root:root /mnt
export HOME=/mnt/server

## install Romestead Dedicated Server
./steamcmd.sh +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login ${STEAM_USER} ${STEAM_PASS} ${STEAM_AUTH} +app_update ${SRCDS_APPID} $( [[ -z ${SRCDS_BETAID} ]] || printf %s "-beta ${SRCDS_BETAID}" ) $( [[ -z ${SRCDS_BETAPASS} ]] || printf %s "-betapassword ${SRCDS_BETAPASS}" ) validate +quit

## set up 64-bit steamclient.so so the server can locate it at runtime
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64
cp -v linux64/steamclient.so ../.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so

## generate a default config.json on first install
CONFIG_FILE=/mnt/server/config.json

if [ ! -f "$CONFIG_FILE" ]; then
    echo "Generating default config.json"
    cat > "$CONFIG_FILE" <<EOF
{
    "AutoStartWorldName": "${WORLD_NAME}",
    "AutoCreateAndLoadWorld": true,
    "AutoCreateWorldSize": ${WORLD_SIZE},
    "Password": "${SERVER_PASSWORD}",
    "Port": ${SERVER_PORT},
    "MaxPlayers": ${MAX_PLAYERS},
    "EnableCheats": false
}
EOF
fi

echo "-----------------------------------------"
echo "Installation completed..."
echo "-----------------------------------------"

variables.name: World Name
variables.description: Name of the world to auto-load on startup. Used as AutoStartWorldName in config.json.

variables.name: World Size
variables.description: 0 = Small, 1 = Standard, 2 = Large. Large worlds require at least 8 GB of RAM to generate.

variables.name: Server Password
variables.description: Password required to join the server. Set to an empty value for no password.

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Maximum number of concurrent players. The wiki recommends 8 GB RAM for 5 or more players.

variables.name: Steam App ID
variables.description: DO NOT EDIT. Steam App ID for the Romestead Dedicated Server.

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Re-run the SteamCMD install step on every server boot to keep the build current. 0 disables, 1 enables.

variables.name: Steam Beta Branch
variables.description: Optional Steam beta branch name to install (e.g. for experimental builds). Leave blank for the default branch.

variables.name: Steam Beta Password
variables.description: Optional password for the Steam beta branch above. Leave blank if the branch does not require one.
